programs.title: Come Dine with Me
programs.desc: Ex-estate agent Vivi serves a Norwegian feast inspired by her homeland, on a night that features ghost stories and nursery rhymes. But there's tension between two guests.

programs.title: Come Dine with Me
programs.desc: On the third night, Charlotte takes a risk with an Asian-inspired menu. But the biggest surprise comes when the group discover her ballerina past.

programs.title: Come Dine with Me
programs.desc: With a simple menu, children's entertainment manager David's sense of fun is the focus of his night and Neil finds himself sandwiched between Shanice and Charlotte..

programs.title: Come Dine with Me
programs.desc: Super-competitive sales director Neil, who resembles James Bond star Daniel Craig, hopes to raise the bar with a caviar starter and artistically angled panna cotta.

programs.title: Paul Merton: Driving Amazing Trains
programs.desc: From the Lakes to Whitby, Paul steams through the north of England, cruises on Windermere, and experiences Queen Victoria's private carriage and a fifty-ton wartime loco.

programs.title: World's Most Secret Hotels
programs.desc: An old Devon jail becomes a liberating retreat. Opulent caves bring the South African wilderness up close. And a historic Swedish lighthouse shines a light for luxury-lovers.
